table-204-204.caption: Show all paragraph ids and texts for the document with name 'Welcome to NY'.
data: Welcome to New York! This document provides an overview of the city.
Getting Around: The city offers various transportation options.
Top Attractions: Visit iconic landmarks such as the Statue of Liberty.
Food and Dining: Experience diverse culinary delights.
Accommodation: Find a wide range of hotels and apartments.
